title: Ensure that Webshell detection is enabled on all web servers

input_row.title: Ensure that Webshell detection is enabled on all web servers
input_row.description: Enable webshell detection on all web servers to scans periodically the Web directories for detecting webshells on servers.
input_row.rationale: Web servers are exposed to the Internet and they are commonly attacked through injected webshell by attackers.
input_row.audit: Through the management console: 1. Logon to Security Center Console. 2. Select Settings. 3. Click General. 4. Click Manage in Webshell Detection. 5. Ensure all web servers are included.
input_row.remediation: Through the management console: 1. Logon to Security Center Console. 2. Select Settings. 3. Click General. 4. Click Manage in Webshell Detection. 5. Add all web servers.

step1_initial_assessment:
**AUDIT APPROACH:** Manual

**MANUAL STEPS:**
1. Log in to the Alibaba Cloud Security Center Console.
2. Navigate to **Settings**.
3. Click on **General**.
4. Click on **Manage** in the **Webshell Detection** section.
5. Check the list of web servers. Ensure that all your active web servers are included in the Webshell Detection settings.
6. Validate whether the feature is enabled for each web server.

**What to verify/validate:**
- Confirm the status of Webshell Detection for all web servers.

**Expected secure configuration:**
- All active web servers should be listed and have Webshell Detection enabled.

**How to confirm compliance:**
- If all web servers are included in Webshell Detection and the feature is enabled, compliance is confirmed. If any server is missing or if the detection is not enabled, then it does not comply with the control.
